scripts.dev:worker: npm run build && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply student-planner-lite-db --local && npx wrangler dev --local --ip localhost --port 8788
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply student-planner-lite-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply student-planner-lite-db --remote
